scope.summary: Makes connection reporting depend on observed liveness probes, labels build capability honestly, and makes doctor report the observed state of each configured connection.
out_of_scope: Live Oracle availability, credentials, and profile configuration.
Changing the SQL guard, session-level policy, or stateless read routing.

entry_points.name: oracle_connection_info
entry_points.trace: connection_info_reports_disconnected_when_the_liveness_round_trip_fails proves a failed ping produces connected:false, a null connection payload, and structured recovery guidance without describe().

entry_points.name: oracle_capabilities dynamic connection surface
entry_points.trace: capability_surface_liveness_ping_quarantines_an_uncertain_retained_session proves the capability surface performs a liveness probe and retains the dispatcher quarantine on an uncertain primary-session failure.

entry_points.name: oraclemcp doctor --online
entry_points.trace: doctor::tests covers a configured-but-unopened stateless pool as a warning and a stateless pool ping failure as a failing connectivity check after primary success.

entry_points.name: startup banner and capability payload
entry_points.trace: build_capability_payloads_do_not_claim_live_connectivity proves the emitted field is built_with_live_db, describing compilation support rather than a current database connection.

limitations: Scoped offline verification passed: cargo fmt -p oraclemcp -p oraclemcp-core -- --check; cargo test -p oraclemcp --lib connection_info_reports_disconnected_when_the_liveness_round_trip_fails -- --nocapture; cargo test -p oraclemcp --lib capability_surface_liveness_ping_quarantines_an_uncertain_retained_session -- --nocapture; cargo test -p oraclemcp --lib qa107_describe_uncertainty -- --nocapture; cargo test -p oraclemcp-core --lib doctor::tests:: -- --nocapture; cargo test -p oraclemcp --bin oraclemcp build_capability_payloads_do_not_claim_live_connectivity -- --nocapture.
No live Oracle outage is claimed; failure behavior is proved with deterministic connection mocks and doctor unit tests.
